items.headline: Nikolaj Ehlers Alexander Nikishin injury status update April 28 2026 Carolina Hurricanes playoffs
items.description:
RALEIGH, N.C. -- Nikolaj Ehlers and Alexander Nikishin could be available for the Carolina Hurricanes at the start of the Eastern Conference Second Round.
“I’m hopeful that both guys will be ready by the looks of it,” Hurricanes coach Rod Brind’Amour said after neither practiced Tuesday.

items.headline: NHL At The Rink podcast talks Buffalo goalies in 1st round
items.description:
Years of being a goalie, including 508 games across 16 seasons in the NHL, has taught Martin Biron the importance of body language and why it matters at the position, for his team and the opponent.

items.headline: Brady Tkachuk fully committed to playing for Ottawa Senators
items.description:
Brady Tkachuk said he’s “fully committed” to the Ottawa Senators and talk of him wanting to play elsewhere is frustrating.
“I feel like I’ve answered this hundreds of times,” Tkachuk said Wednesday. “I feel like I’ve never shown, never said, none of those things have ever come out of my

items.headline: Tampa Bay Lightning Victor Hedman playing status update April 28 2026
items.description:
BRANDON, Fla. -- Victor Hedman couldn’t stop smiling Tuesday.
Neither could many of his Tampa Bay Lightning teammates.

items.headline: Boston coach Sturm helps Bruins force game 6 in NHL playoffs against Sabres
items.description:
BUFFALO -- Marco Sturm waited as long as he could.
“I was hiding,” he said, and laughed.

items.headline: NHL EDGE stats leaders for 2025-2026 season
items.description:
NHL.com's fantasy staff continues to cover the latest trends and storylines in the League through the lens of NHL EDGE puck and player tracker stats. Throughout the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs, we will identify the leaders in key advanced metrics.

items.headline: Vezina Trophy finalists for best goalie for 2025-26 announced by NHL
items.description:
Ilya Sorokin, Jeremy Swayman and Andrei Vasilevskiy were named finalists for the Vezina Trophy on Wednesday.
The winner of the award, which is given annually to the goalie voted the best at his position by NHL general managers, will be announced at a later date.

items.headline: 2025-2026 Vezina trophy finalists announced
items.description: NEW YORK – Ilya Sorokin of the New York Islanders, Jeremy Swayman of the Boston Bruins and Andrei Vasilevskiy of the Tampa Bay Lightning are the three finalists for the 2025-26 Vezina Trophy, awarded “to the goaltender adjudged to be the best at his position,” the National Hockey League announced

items.headline: Mats Zuccarello sparks Minnesota Wild in Game 5 in return to lineup
items.description:

items.headline: Anaheim Ducks Edmonton Oilers Game 5 recap April 28, 2026
items.description: EDMONTON -- Leon Draisaitl scored twice and the Edmonton Oilers avoided elimination with a 4-1 win against the Anaheim Ducks in Game 5 of the Western Conference First Round at Rogers Place on Tuesday.

items.headline: Edmonton Oilers find a way to ‘survive another day’ in Game 5
items.description:
EDMONTON -- The journey back from a 3-1 deficit in the best-of-7 series against the Anaheim Ducks started with a strong first period for the Edmonton Oilers in Game 6 of the Western Conference First Round.

items.headline: Minnesota Wild seize momentum in Game 5 win against Stars
items.description:
DALLAS -- Brock Faber doesn't want the day off. He wants to go home, go straight to Grand Casino Arena, get his equipment on, lace up his skates and play Game 6 of the Western Conference First Round as quickly as humanly possible.
